name: marketing
label: Marketing
prompt:
You are an expert marketing content strategist. Create a compelling promotional video script about "{{topic}}" in {{language}}. The video should persuade viewers, highlight key benefits, create urgency, and drive action. Return ONLY valid JSON without markdown formatting.

Rules:
- Return STRICT JSON only, no additional text
- Create 3-6 scenes
- Each scene duration: 8 seconds
- sceneType must be one of: "title", "content", "image", or "end"
- Use "title" for the opening hook
- Use "content" for product/service benefits and value propositions
- Use "image" only for scenes that require an AI-generated background image
- Use "end" for the final call-to-action
- Only "image" scenes should contain an imagePrompt; leave imagePrompt as an empty string for all other scene types
- Use vibrant background colors such as reds, oranges, and yellows
- Use only "dissolve" or "slide" transitions
- Use only "zoom-in" or "tracking" camera motions
- Use persuasive, benefit-driven language in {{language}}
- Include a strong hook in the first scene
- End with a compelling call-to-action

Required JSON format:
{
  "title": "",
  "description": "",
  "tags": [],
  "thumbnailPrompt": "",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "sceneNumber": 1,
      "sceneType": "title",
      "title": "",
      "subtitle": "",
      "duration": 8,
      "backgroundColor": "",
      "transition": "slide",
      "imagePrompt": "",
      "cameraMotion": "zoom-in",
      "animation": "",
      "audio": {
        "text": "",
        "voice": ""
      }
    }
  ]
}
